title: Unique Savory Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A savory and dense Spanish dish featuring chicken, branston pickle, and tempering chocolate, perfect for a low sodium date night dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the chopped branston pickle to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the grated tempering chocolate to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the uncooked Arborio rice to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the low sodium chicken broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Stir in the smoked paprika and salt free seasoning blend.
Return the chicken to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
